title: Feedback API, News Section, and Observability Improvements
author: Agenthood Team
summary: New features: feedback API for chat responses, news section with RSS feed, enriched analytics, structured logging across the stack, and hardening follow-ups.

title: Playground Security Hardening & Performance Improvements
author: Agenthood Team
summary: We've completed a security audit of the Studio playground — adding SSRF protection, CSP headers, origin validation, rate limiting, hydration fixes, and eliminating all lint warnings.

title: Real-User Performance Monitoring with Vercel Speed Insights
author: Agenthood Team
summary: We've added Vercel Speed Insights to monitor real-user Core Web Vitals — LCP, CLS, INP, and TTFB — across all pages.

title: Agenthood Academy Outage Post-Mortem
author: Agenthood Team
summary: A detailed post-mortem of the Academy outage on April 28, 2026, covering the docs rendering issue, DNS misconfiguration, fixes applied, and preventive measures.

title: Documentation Audit: 43 Issues Fixed Across 21 Files
author: Agenthood Team
summary: A comprehensive audit of 106 documentation files found and fixed 43 issues — broken links, stale references, outdated paths, and inconsistencies across 21 files.

title: CI Pipeline Refinement: Redundancy Removed, Builds Optimized
author: Agenthood Team
summary: Streamlined the CI pipeline by removing a duplicate workflow, skipping builds on doc-only changes, and fixing stale-comment encoding bugs in reviewer automation.
